label: Realtid — Ably
summary: Use when a Next.js App Router project needs authenticated Ably realtime messaging from browser components, including pub/sub, presence, notifications, chat, or collaborative updates. Provides a server token-auth route plus a browser-side singleton Realtime client and optional provider wiring. Demo mode (mock: visual): the live widget/surface renders fully and shows an honest 'realtid ej kopplad'-notice when ABLY_API_KEY is missing or a placeholder (the auth route returns 503 realtime-not-configured) — never a simulated transport between real users.
summarySv: Realtidsfunktioner (livechatt, notiser, närvaro, samarbete) via Ably. Utan riktig nyckel visas realtidsytan i demoläge med en tydlig notis — inga meddelanden skickas mellan riktiga besökare förrän Ably är kopplat.

envVars.purpose: Server-only Ably API key used by the Next.js auth route to create token requests for browser clients. Get it from the Ably dashboard for the target app; do not expose it with NEXT_PUBLIC_.

notes: Keep the API key server-only. The auth route returns 503 realtime-not-configured when ABLY_API_KEY is missing OR a preview placeholder (F2 mock-seed values must never trigger a real Ably call), so the integration degrades at feature runtime rather than build time. lastVerified carries the legacy source's verification date until the first preview/generate-test selects this dossier (same no-false-green rule as PR #422).
